## Checklist

- [ ] Branched from `main` (not committing directly to `main`)
- [ ] If adding/editing a skill: path added to `.claude-plugin/plugin.json`
- [ ] If adding/editing a skill: `./scripts/link-skills.sh` run locally
- [ ] If the skill is borrowed/adapted: `skills-lock.json` entry + credits row
      added via `node scripts/refresh-credits.mjs`
